# Quick note

A short document to test inline formatting and links.

This paragraph has **bold text**, *italic text*, ~~strikethrough~~, and `inline code` next to a [Markhub repo link](https://github.com/MateoKodyo/markhub).

You can combine **bold *with italic inside*** if you want, and the [Tauri docs](https://tauri.app) are worth a read.

---

The horizontal rule above should round-trip cleanly.

Another paragraph with an autolink: <https://blocknotejs.org>.

End.
